text.title: Architecture Style Decision Tree Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the decision-tree-architecture-style methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.action: Capture team_size + deploy_frequency target + DORA score + domain coupling.

step.name: score-supporting-conditions
step.action: If microservices candidate, verify ≥3 of 4 supporting conditions hold.

step.name: tag-reversibility
step.action: Apply adr-reversibility-tagging; architecture style is almost never two_way_door.
step.decision-gate: If reversibility tags as one_way_door_irrevocable, escalate to founder sign-off.
